document_summary: Source credibility evidence for the publication/media coverage context. Contains information about Advertising Panorama journal (from the Service Platform for Chinese Periodicals) and a detailed profile of People's Daily Online, a major Chinese state media company with 563 million+ readers, 33-time China News Prize winner, listed on Shanghai Stock Exchange.

snippets.text: Advertising Panorama: Comprehensive Edition adheres to the mission of "new vision,new insights and new sense of responsibility" and focuses on "influencing the mainstream advertising population."It focuses on researching and grasping industry trends, exploring the science of laws and rules and offering constructive opinions,and focusing on major events and highlights in advertising, marketing, and communications, providing in- depth components for various circumstances in the sector to play the role of supervision for advertising and public opinions. It also analyzes the methods and strategies about the media operation and branched media communication from different perspectives. The readers mainly include core marketing professionals, executives of advertising agencies, employees of media and advertising production companies, and scholars of relevant institutions.
snippets.subject: Advertising Panorama
snippets.reasoning: Professional journal focused on advertising, marketing and communications, targeting core marketing professionals and scholars

snippets.text: Advertising Panorama is a professional journal of advertising, marketing and communication approved by the General Administration of Press and Publication of the People's Republic of China and open to the public at home and abroad. It is the only professional journal of advertising marketing and communication in China published in ten- day periodicals. It publishes "Advertising Panorama (Comprehensive Edition)" (the first issue, i.e. "Creative Communication"), "Advertising Panorama (Theory Edition)" (the middle issue, i.e. "Advertising Research") and "Advertising Panorama (Media Edition)" (the second issue, i.e. "Media") respectively.
snippets.subject: Advertising Panorama
snippets.reasoning: Only professional advertising/marketing/communication journal in China approved by the General Administration of Press and Publication, establishing its unique standing

snippets.text: People's Daily Online, founded on January 1, 1997, is the online version of People's Daily. It is a publicly traded media and culture company, with People's Daily having a controlling stake.
snippets.subject: People's Daily Online
snippets.reasoning: People's Daily Online is the online version of China's most authoritative state newspaper, publicly traded, establishing its credibility as a publication platform

snippets.text: In addition to its Chinese version, People's Daily Online also publishes versions in seven ethnic minority languages and in 12 foreign languages. People's Daily Online has endeavored to develop its content business in four aspects, including opinions and commentaries, in-depth stories, policy analysis and policy recommendations.
snippets.subject: People's Daily Online
snippets.reasoning: Publishes in 12 foreign languages and 7 ethnic minority languages, demonstrating massive international reach

snippets.text: People's Daily Online has more than 563 million readers on various media platforms, including its websites, mobile apps, and social media platforms, among other formats. Using the mobile app "People's Daily Online Plus" as an umbrella
snippets.subject: People's Daily Online
snippets.reasoning: Over 563 million readers across platforms, demonstrating enormous audience reach for any content published

snippets.text: People's Daily Online is a 33- time winner of the China News Prize, winning the Special Award once and the First Prize 14 times.
snippets.subject: People's Daily Online
snippets.reasoning: 33-time China News Prize winner with 14 First Prizes, establishing exceptional journalistic credibility

snippets.text: On April 27, 2012, People's Daily Online went public on the Shanghai Stock Exchange (code: 603000). Through its market operations, People's Daily Online has further optimized its business layout, having primarily established a ConTech system, becoming one of the top state- owned media and culture companies in China in terms of market value and ranking among the world's top 500 media outlets.
snippets.subject: People's Daily Online
snippets.reasoning: Listed on Shanghai Stock Exchange (603000), top state-owned media company, ranking among world's top 500 media outlets

snippets.text: established the State Key Laboratory of Communication Content Cognition, which focuses on the study of AI in such areas as the precise dissemination of mainstream values, smart content review and risk control, the national governance of cyberspace, and the construction of intelligent computing facilities.
snippets.subject: People's Daily Online
snippets.reasoning: State Key Laboratory of Communication Content Cognition demonstrates People's Daily Online's role in cutting-edge communication research

entities.identity: Major Chinese state media company, online version of People's Daily
